sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108599" key="u(po/komyos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπόκομψος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n108599.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rather neat</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">elegant,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1617.tlg001:66" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polem.Phgn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">66</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
